segment.source: Renders a grid of pricing plan cards where each plan shows its monthly price prominently with the annual price ('billed annually') beneath, plus description, check-marked features, and a CTA button. Use it for: plan lists quoting both monthly and yearly rates in the source document. Prefer 'Annual vs Monthly Pricing' when per-plan savings should be emphasized; 'Three Tier Pricing' when only one billing cycle exists.
